The Hotel Kleopatra Experience

Everything you need for an unforgettable stay

From the moment you arrive, every detail is designed for your comfort — whether you are here to relax by the pool, explore Ulcinj Old Town, or simply unwind with a sea view.

The Experience

Every comfort, considered

From the first morning coffee to the last star above the sea, nothing is left to chance. This is hospitality that anticipates.

Hours & Info

Plan your day

Reception
07:00 - 23:00

Late arrival? Let us know — we will wait up for you.

Breakfast
07:30 - 10:00

Buffet style with fresh local produce and made-to-order eggs.

Restaurant
12:00 - 22:00

Lunch and dinner served on the sea-view terrace.

Pool
08:00 - 20:00

Outdoor freshwater pool with sun loungers and umbrellas.

Perfectly placed on the Ulcinj Riviera

Hotel Kleopatra sits on the hillside above Ulcinj, offering sweeping views of the Adriatic and the Old Town. Velika Plaza beach is 3 km away, the Old Town is a 10-minute drive, and Ada Bojana is 7 km south.

Letters from the coast

Seasonal offers, quiet-season escapes and stories from Ulcinj — a few times a year, never more.

Hotel Kleopatra
Ulcinj · Montenegro

A family-run hotel above the Adriatic, where every guest arrives as a stranger and leaves as a friend.
